```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:0.7em 1em 0.75em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- T-bar: the shared example (full-width bar, one line) -->
 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #D8CFE0;border-radius:14px;padding:0.5em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.7em;">
  <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#F0EDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="clipboard-list" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.9;"></i></div>
  <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;white-space:nowrap;">A <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/surveydown-skill</span> with six focused sections</div>
 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:0.5em 0 0;"></div>

 <!-- two groups: File structure (purple) | One topic (teal) -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;align-items:stretch;margin-top:0.9em;">

  <!-- LEFT: File structure tree -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F5F4FB;border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.8em 0.7em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(86,84,162,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(86,84,162,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="folder-tree" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>File structure</div>

   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:11px;padding:0.7em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);flex:1;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
     <div style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="folder-git-2" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.52em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.1;">surveydown-skill/</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;line-height:1.55;">
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">├─ </span><span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">SKILL.md</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">├─ </span><span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">author/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">│  ├─ </span><span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">create-survey/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">│  └─ </span><span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">connect-database/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">├─ </span><span style="color:#CB6A43;font-weight:700;">deploy/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">│  ├─ </span><span style="color:#CB6A43;font-weight:700;">hugging-face/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">│  ├─ </span><span style="color:#CB6A43;font-weight:700;">google-cloud/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">│  └─ </span><span style="color:#CB6A43;font-weight:700;">posit-cloud/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">└─ </span><span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">demo/</span></div>
     <div style="white-space:pre;"><span style="color:#C4B8C9;">   └─ </span><span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">record-video/</span></div>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: One topic -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F4FBF8;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.8em 0.7em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(44,132,117,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3DA890,#2C8475);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(44,132,117,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="target" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>One topic</div>

   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:11px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:0.7em;">

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;">
     <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="clipboard-list" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.66em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.15;">surveydown</div>
    </div>

    <div style="height:1px;background:#EDEAE2;"></div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;"><div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.42em;background:#E5F2EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="pen-line" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.9;"></i></div><div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;"><span style="font-weight:700;">Author</span> a survey</div></div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;"><div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.42em;background:#E5F2EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="cloud-upload" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.9;"></i></div><div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;"><span style="font-weight:700;">Deploy</span> to any host</div></div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;"><div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.42em;background:#E5F2EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="video" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.9;"></i></div><div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;"><span style="font-weight:700;">Demo</span> with a recording</div></div>

   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
